A

addEvent(Event) - Method in class EventManager
Adds an event if it is not null and its ID does not already exist.
addUser(User) - Method in class UserManager
Adds a user if the username is unique.
addVenue(Venue) - Method in class VenueManager
Adds a venue if the ID is not already present.
Admin - Class in Unnamed Package
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Represents an administrator user in the TicketMiner system.
Admin(int, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class Admin
Creates a new Admin user.
Arena - Class in Unnamed Package
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Represents an Arena venue in the TicketMiner system.
Arena(int, String, int, int, double, double) - Constructor for class Arena
Creates a new Arena venue.
Auditorium - Class in Unnamed Package
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Represents an Auditorium venue in the TicketMiner system.
Auditorium(int, String, int, int, double, double) - Constructor for class Auditorium
Creates a new Auditorium venue.

capacity - Variable in class Venue

cost - Variable in class Venue

CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Represents a Customer user in the TicketMiner system.

D

date - Variable in class Event
 
deleteEvent(Event) - Method in class EventManager
Deletes an event from the system.
deleteUser(User) - Method in class UserManager
Deletes a user from the system.
deleteUserById(int) - Method in class UserManager
Deletes a user by ID.
deleteVenue(Venue) - Method in class VenueManager
Deletes a venue from the system.

E

Event - Class in Unnamed Package
 
Event(int, String, LocalDate, LocalTime, double, double, double) - Constructor for class Event
Creates a new event.
EventManager - Class in Unnamed Package
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Manages all events in the system using a HashMap.
EventManager() - Constructor for class EventManager
Creates an empty event manager.

F

findAllByDate(LocalDate) - Method in class EventManager
Finds all events scheduled on a given date.
findByDate(LocalDate) - Method in class EventManager
Finds an event by date.
findById(int) - Method in class EventManager
Finds an event by ID.
findById(int) - Method in class UserManager
Finds a user by ID.
findById(int) - Method in class VenueManager
Finds a venue by ID.
findByName(String) - Method in class EventManager
Finds an event by name.
findByName(String) - Method in class VenueManager
Finds a venue by name.
findByName(String, String) - Method in class UserManager
Finds a user by first name and last name.
findByType(String) - Method in class VenueManager
Finds a venue by type (Arena, Stadium, etc.).
findByUsername(String) - Method in class UserManager
Finds a user by username.
firstName - Variable in class User
 

G

getAllEvents() - Method in class EventManager
Returns all events currently stored in the system.
getAllUsers() - Method in class UserManager
Returns all users stored in the system.
getAllVenues() - Method in class VenueManager
Returns all venues stored in the system.
getCapacity() - Method in class Venue
Returns the venue capacity.
getConcertCapacity() - Method in class Venue
Returns the concert capacity.
getCost() - Method in class Venue
Returns the cost of the venue.
getDate() - Method in class Event
Returns the event date.
getFirstName() - Method in class User
Returns the user's first name.
getGoldPrice() - Method in class Event
Returns the Gold ticket price.
getId() - Method in class Event
Returns the event ID.
getId() - Method in class User
Returns the user ID.
getId() - Method in class Venue
Returns the venue ID.
getLastName() - Method in class User
Returns the user's last name.
getMembership() - Method in class Customer
Returns whether the customer has a TicketMiner membership.
getMoneyAvailable() - Method in class Customer
Returns the customer's available balance.
getName() - Method in class Event
Returns the event name.
getName() - Method in class Venue
Returns the venue name.
getNextId() - Method in class EventManager
Returns the next available event ID.
getNextId() - Method in class UserManager
Returns the next available user ID.
getNextId() - Method in class VenueManager
Returns the next available venue ID.
getPassword() - Method in class User
Returns the user's password.
getSilverPrice() - Method in class Event
Returns the Silver ticket price.
getTime() - Method in class Event
Returns the event time.
getType() - Method in class Event
Returns the type of event (Concert, Sport, Special).
getType() - Method in class Venue
Returns the venue type (Arena, Stadium, etc).
getUsername() - Method in class User
Returns the username.
getVipPercent() - Method in class Venue
Returns the VIP seating percentage.
getVipPrice() - Method in class Event
Returns the VIP ticket price.
goldPrice - Variable in class Event

lastName - Variable in class User
 
log(String) - Method in class Logger
Writes a message to the log file with the current timestamp.
Logger - Class in Unnamed Package
CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Handles logging messages to a log file with timestamps.
Logger(String) - Constructor for class Logger
Creates a new Logger that writes messages to a specified file.

CS 3331 – Advanced Object-Oriented Programming Project Part 1 – TicketMiner Manages all users in the system using HashMaps.

username - Variable in class User
